formula: var bal=parseFloat(inputs.balance)||0;var r=(parseFloat(inputs.rate)||0)/1200;var pmt=parseFloat(inputs.payment)||0;var months=0;var total_int=0;var b=bal;while(b>0&&months<1000){var int_b=b*r;var prin=pmt-int_b;if(prin<=0){months=999;break;}b-=prin;months++;total_int+=int_b;}return{months:months.toFixed(0),total_interest:total_int.toFixed(2)};
